title: mentha marrubiastrum
intro: Mentha marrubiastrum, also known as white horehound, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe and North Africa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of white horehound include relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, soothing sore throats, and aiding in digestion. White horehound can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
